meta.title: How does Atlas Services work?
meta.description: Discover how to connect with local professionals. Simple, fast and reliable. For clients: search, contact and rate. For providers: publish, stand out and earn.

hero.title: How does Atlas Services work?
hero.subtitle: The simplest platform to connect local talent with those who need quick, reliable solutions.

steps.title: 1. Search
steps.desc: Filter by category and area. We're everywhere!

steps.title: 2. Contact
steps.desc: Review their profile and contact directly by WhatsApp or phone.

steps.title: 3. Rate
steps.desc: After the job, leave your review to help others.

steps.title: 1. Publish
steps.desc: Create your profile in minutes. Easy, fast and free to start.

steps.title: 2. Stand out with Premium
steps.desc: Activate a Premium plan to appear first in searches and get the verification badge.

steps.title: 3. Earn
steps.desc: Receive calls from new clients every day directly.
